questions.question: What is the primary purpose of testing in software development, and how does it contribute to software quality?
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the role of testing in ensuring software quality

questions.question: Compare and contrast the techniques of Pair Programming and Code Review, and explain which one is more suitable for improving software quality in a team setting.
questions.hint: Discuss the benefits and drawbacks of each technique

questions.question: A software development project is using the Agile methodology. What is the role of Continuous Integration (CI) in maintaining high software quality, and explain how it can be implemented in an Agile project?
questions.hint: Describe the benefits of CI and provide steps for implementing it in an Agile project
